channel.title: Notes on Jeffreys Ruminations
channel.description: Recent content in Notes on Jeffreys Ruminations

item.title: Network Security Tools Notebook
item.description: This page is for my Network Security Tools and Tips/Tricks. Links: Have I Been Pwned! - A site to check if your email address has been in most of the public breaches VirusTotal - Check Links or Files to see if it is a virus. This site checks your submission with 60+ AV engines. It also submits files to the next site for analysis. Malwr.com - Used with VirusTotal to sandbox viruses to determine what they do.
